summary: Very good audience (AUD) recording captures a solid, though unremarkable, Grateful Dead performance.
review: The AUD source is praised as the best available for this show, offering clear and listenable sound. The concert itself is described as a good show but without any standout moments or highlights, making it an enjoyable but not essential listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers gave 3‑star ratings and note a decent show with a very good audience recording, but no specific highlights; limited data (only two reviews) yields moderate confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as a very good AUD recording and the best available for this show; no technical complaints noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall considered a good, steady performance but lacking memorable highlights according to reviewers.
